# MerchantFix

MerchantFix is an independent public-page evidence review for stores preparing Merchant Center materials.

## Core pages
- https://soup-rolls.github.io/merchantfix-free-check/
- https://soup-rolls.github.io/merchantfix-free-check/errors/
- https://soup-rolls.github.io/merchantfix-free-check/errors/categories/
- https://soup-rolls.github.io/merchantfix-free-check/about.html
- https://soup-rolls.github.io/merchantfix-free-check/contact.html
- https://soup-rolls.github.io/merchantfix-free-check/privacy.html

## Category pages
- https://soup-rolls.github.io/merchantfix-free-check/errors/categories/product-identifiers.html
- https://soup-rolls.github.io/merchantfix-free-check/errors/categories/content-and-landing.html
- https://soup-rolls.github.io/merchantfix-free-check/errors/categories/price-and-availability.html
- https://soup-rolls.github.io/merchantfix-free-check/errors/categories/shipping-and-tax.html
- https://soup-rolls.github.io/merchantfix-free-check/errors/categories/variants-and-attributes.html
- https://soup-rolls.github.io/merchantfix-free-check/errors/categories/trust-and-policy.html

## Boundaries
- Free preview runs locally in the browser.
- Full materials enter Tally only when the user chooses to submit them.
- No account login.
- No appeal submission.
- No promised platform decision.

## Reference pages
- https://soup-rolls.github.io/merchantfix-free-check/errors/missing-value-gtin.html
- https://soup-rolls.github.io/merchantfix-free-check/errors/price-mismatch.html
- https://soup-rolls.github.io/merchantfix-free-check/errors/shipping-cost-mismatch.html
- https://soup-rolls.github.io/merchantfix-free-check/errors/misrepresentation.html
